channel.title: Plugins on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Plugins on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: k8s: From Kubernetes Dashboard to Headlamp: Understanding the Transition
item.description:
Kubernetes Dashboard has been archived, and this post explains how Headlamp maps to Dashboard workflows while adding multi-cluster support, application-centric views, plugins, and flexible deployment options. It also notes that a step-by-step migration guide will follow.

  • Source: Kubernetes Official Blog

item.title: github: Enterprise-managed plugins in GitHub Copilot CLI are now in public preview
item.description:
GitHub Copilot CLI now supports enterprise-managed plugins in public preview. Enterprise admins can configure and distribute plugins to Copilot CLI users across the organization.

  • Source: GitHub
